title: MegaVerse
description: An easy-to-use, lightweight and feature-rich World Management plugin, create and delete worlds entirely in seconds!
body:
![MegaVerse Logo](https://i.imgur.com/Wu9hlT4.png)

MegaVerse

MegaVerse is the ultimate Minecraft server World Manager, focused to be user-friendly, lightweight and fancy.

--- # Plugin Features ## Built-in generators MegaVerse alone adds **5** new more free custom world generators, such as a **Void Generator**, **Aether-style world**, and more! ## Familiar Interface Familiar by design, but smarter, faster, and easier than ever - with clean, modern menus that make world management a seamless experience. ## World Flags MegaVerse has a unique system of World Flags! They are used to block, allow, or customize certain features of a world, such as displaying a message on entry, disabling portals, disabling PvP, and more similar functionalities. ## Tasks Create, delete, regenerate, manage worlds and more entirely by using automatic tasks! Highly configurable, supports custom commands and more! ![tasks.yml example file](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bec629ac077a16655a21d56f7d8667f13e92e36d.png) ## User-friendly MegaVerse is designed from it's ground to be user-friendly and simple to use. Need to create a world? Have everything you need inside a small and simple menu with just one command! ### ... and more MegaVerse is constantly evolving with updates that bring new features, essential patches, and significant improvements. Helping server owners from the entire world. --- ## Support my work This plugin is and will be completely free. If you want to support me, you can through the links below!
--- ## Version compatibility MegaVerse is compatible with Spigot, Paper (and any other forks) servers running versions from 1.17 to 1.22. ## Documentation You can check the full plugin documentation [here](https://squareplugins.gitbook.io/megaverse)
